description_long: This object is a compact, wireless computer mouse with a sleek, ergonomic design. Its body is primarily matte black with a slightly contoured top surface for comfortable hand placement. The top features a central scroll wheel and two main click buttons, seamlessly integrated into the upper shell. The sides are gently curved, providing a smooth grip, and the overall form is streamlined for easy portability. There are no visible wires or ports, indicating a battery-powered, wireless operation. The brand name is subtly printed on the top surface, adding a minimalistic touch.
description: A sleek, wireless computer mouse with a matte black finish, ergonomic curves, and a central scroll wheel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, curved profile and seamless matte finish.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded back and subtle brand marking on the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous, streamlined shape.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the scroll wheel, two main buttons, and the brand name.
